task.description:
This is a simulation task. 
            You are a simulation agent that simulates a user's rating and review with an item. 
            There is a user with id and an item with id.

output.review: I had a great time at Lowry Parcade, the classic arcade and craft beer bar in Tampa, FL. The unlimited play with paid admission on certain days is a fantastic deal, and the loyalty program called Parcade Points is a nice touch. I enjoyed playing pinball and arcade games, and the events and private parties they host are a lot of fun. The staff is friendly and knowledgeable, and the atmosphere is lively and welcoming. I would definitely recommend Lowry Parcade to anyone looking for a unique entertainment experience.
